message_text: The lift in Block A has been stuck on floor 3 since yesterday morning. Several residents are unable to use it.
Garbage has not been collected from the ground floor for 3 days. It's starting to smell.
Water leak in apartment 4B ceiling — drops are coming from above. Urgent!
The hallway lights on floors 2 and 3 in Block C have been flickering for a week.
The main gate intercom system is not working. Visitors can't buzz in.
The pool area has not been cleaned in two weeks. There is algae on the walls.
Lift in Block B making loud grinding noise. Safety concern for residents.
The rooftop water tank is making noise at night. Possible pump issue.
Parking barrier arm broken. Anyone can enter the lot without authorization.
Central AC in lobby is blowing hot air. Temperature is unbearable.
Corridor cleaning on floor 7 Block A hasn't been done since last Thursday.
Power socket in gym not working. Treadmills and equipment cannot be used.
Water pressure very low in Block C apartments above floor 5.
CCTV cameras in Block D stairwell appear offline. Security concern.
Lift door in Block D is not closing properly — keeps reopening after 2 seconds.
